vulnerabilities.description: Werkzeug Debugger console is exposed and accessible, with debugger resources available via the ?__debugger__ endpoints. Although the console is PIN-locked, running with debug enabled can lead to code execution if the PIN is obtained via logs or information leaks.
Server header reveals underlying stack: Werkzeug/3.0.6 and Python/3.8.20, aiding targeted attacks.

Unauthenticated WSDL endpoint returns 200 with application/xml content type but empty body. If it supports fetching remote WSDLs via a URL parameter, it could enable SSRF. Not confirmed; further validation needed.
Service is served over plain HTTP, which would expose credentials (e.g., login form) on untrusted networks.
